scoringPlays.text: Kendall Evans 3 Yd pass from Blake Horvath (Nathan Kirkwood Kick)
Matt Adcock 1 Yd pass from Brendon Lewis (Gianni Spetic Kick)
Alex Tecza 2 Yd Run (Nathan Kirkwood Kick)
Cortez Braham Jr. 38 Yd pass from Brendon Lewis (Gianni Spetic Kick)
Alex Tecza 12 Yd Run (Nathan Kirkwood Kick)
Blake Horvath 2 Yd Run (Nathan Kirkwood Kick)

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gianni Spetic makes 31-yard field goal) 2025/11/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Blake Horvath shovels it Kendall Evans for a Navy TD
videos.description: Blake Horvath pitches the ball to Kendall Evans for a touchdown as Navy takes a 7-3 lead over Memphis.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Blake Horvath shovels it Kendall Evans for a Navy TD) 2025/11/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brendon Lewis finds Matt Adcock for a Tigers TD
videos.description: Brendon Lewis throws a short pass to Matt Adcock to put Memphis in front of Navy 10-7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brendon Lewis finds Matt Adcock for a Tigers TD) 2025/11/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alex Tecza plows in for a Navy TD
videos.description: Alex Tecza scores on a 2-yard touchdown rush for the Midshipmen.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alex Tecza plows in for a Navy TD) 2025/11/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cortez Braham hauls in tipped pass for TD
videos.description: Cortez Braham makes the catch on a Brendon Lewis shot to the end zone for Memphis.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cortez Braham hauls in tipped pass for TD) 2025/11/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alex Tecza navigates in for a Navy TD
videos.description: Alex Tecza scores on a 12-yard rushing touchdown for Navy.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alex Tecza navigates in for a Navy TD) 2025/11/28 ESHEET

videos.headline: Blake Horvath creeps in for a Navy TD
videos.description: Blake Horvath keeps it on a 2-yard touchdown for Navy.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Blake Horvath creeps in for a Navy TD) 2025/11/28 ESHEET
